SEARCH
Package com.dua3.utility.data

Interface Image

All Superinterfaces:
Storable
All Known Subinterfaces:
AwtImage, DataRetainingImage, FxImage
All Known Implementing Classes:
AwtMutableImage, AwtStandardImage, FxDataRetainingImage, FxMutableImage, FxWrappedImage, ImageBuffer, MutableImage
public interface Image extends Storable
Raster image interface.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default String
    defaultExtension()
    Provides the default file extension for images handled by this implementation.
    int[]
    getArgb()
    Get image data.
    int
    height()
    Get image height.
    default String
    mimeType()
    Returns the MIME type of the image.
    int
    width()
    Get image width.
    default void
    write(OutputStream out)
    Writes the current image to the specified output stream using its MIME type.

  • Method Details

    • width

      int width()
      Get image width.
      Returns:
      the image width in pixels

    • height

      int height()
      Get image height.
      Returns:
      the image height in pixels

    • getArgb

      int[] getArgb()
      Get image data. The returned array consists of width*height integers each storing a single pixels color encoded in ARGB byte order using premultiplied alpha.
      Returns:
      the image width in pixels

    • defaultExtension

      default String defaultExtension()
      Provides the default file extension for images handled by this implementation.
      Specified by:
      defaultExtension in interface Storable
      Returns:
      the default file extension, which is "png"

    • mimeType

      default String mimeType()
      Returns the MIME type of the image.
      Specified by:
      mimeType in interface Storable
      Returns:
      the MIME type as a String, defaulting to ImageUtil.MIME_TYPE_PNG

    • write

      default void write(OutputStream out) throws IOException
      Writes the current image to the specified output stream using its MIME type.
      Specified by:
      write in interface Storable
      Parameters:
      out - the output stream to write the image data to; must not be null
      Throws:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs during the writing process
